'''rawopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roading|roading]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roading|roading]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rawopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræwepeth|ræwepeth]] || [[word:ræwepej|ræwepej]] || [[word:ræwepesh|ræwepesh]] || [[word:ræwepe|ræwepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rawowopoth|rawowopoth]] || [[word:rawowopoj|rawowopoj]] || [[word:rawowoposh|rawowoposh]] || [[word:rawowopo|rawowopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rawopoth|rawopoth]] || [[word:rawopoj|rawopoj]] || [[word:rawoposh|rawoposh]] || [[word:rawopo|rawopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rawofpofth|rawofpofth]] || [[word:rawofpofj|rawofpofj]] || [[word:rawofpofsh|rawofpofsh]] || [[word:rawofpof|rawofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rawopotho|rawopotho]] || [[word:rawopojo|rawopojo]] || [[word:rawoposho|rawoposho]] || [[word:rawopoko|rawopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rawopoth|rawopoth]] || [[word:rawopoj|rawopoj]] || [[word:rawoposh|rawoposh]] || [[word:rawopo|rawopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rawopothol|rawopothol]] || [[word:rawopojol|rawopojol]] || [[word:rawoposhol|rawoposhol]] || [[word:rawopokol|rawopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rawopoothotho|rawopoothotho]] || [[word:rawopoojojo|rawopoojojo]] || [[word:rawopooshosho|rawopooshosho]] || [[word:rawopooko|rawopooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rawopothon|rawopothon]] || [[word:rawopojon|rawopojon]] || [[word:rawoposhon|rawoposhon]] || [[word:rawopokon|rawopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rawopothooro|rawopothooro]] || [[word:rawopojooro|rawopojooro]] || [[word:rawoposhooro|rawoposhooro]] || [[word:rawopokooro|rawopokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
